snippet.title: BTS: O Reencontro | Documentário | Trailer oficial | Netflix
snippet.description:
BTS: O Reencontro, um documentário da Netflix. Confira os bastidores do aguardado retorno dos reis do k-pop, BTS. Acompanhe em primeira mão a jornada de dúvidas, alegrias e redescobertas dos sete integrantes da banda que voltaram ao estúdio, criaram músicas novas e lançaram o comeback da década! Com direção do aclamado Bao Nguyen ("O Freelancer: O Homem Por Trás da Foto", "A Noite que Mudou o Pop") e produção da This Machine ("Martha", "Karol G: Mañana Fue Muy Bonito") e da HYBE.

BTS: O Reencontro, estreia em 27 de março. Só na Netflix.

Assista na Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82158609

Inscreva-se: https://bit.ly/31ynwtw

Sobre a Netflix:
A Netflix é um dos principais serviços de entretenimento do mundo com um vasto catálogo de séries, filmes, jogos e eventos ao vivo disponíveis em diversos idiomas. Nossos assinantes podem assistir, pausar e voltar a um título quantas vezes quiserem, onde quer que estejam, e alterar o plano a qualquer momento.

BTS: O Reencontro | Documentário | Trailer oficial | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@NetflixBrasil

Eles voltaram! O BTS se reúne em Los Angeles para gravar o álbum "Arirang". Este documentário oferece acesso inédito ao grupo, que inicia uma nova era.

snippet.title: Sekiro: No Defeat | Official Trailer 2 | Crunchyroll
snippet.description:
The time is Sengoku.

Japan is fractured into many independent nations entangled in ceaseless war. At the center lies Ashina, a land of sacred earth and ancient mystery. Two decades after Sword Saint Isshin Ashina reclaimed the region in a brutal coup, a new threat emerges from within: The Interior Ministry. Desperate to protect his homeland, Isshin’s grandson Genichiro turns to forbidden powers. The only hope lies in a kidnapped boy — the Divine Heir — and his silent protector: a loyal shinobi known only as Sekiro.

This is the story of a lord and his retainer — and their quest to restore balance to a nation on the edge.

snippet.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - First Trailer (2026) Tom Holland, Sadie Sink, Zendaya | Sony Pictures
snippet.description:
— Attention Viewers ⚠️
— This is a Fan-Made Concept Trailer for:
— Spider-Man: Brand New Day

— This video is a fan-made concept trailer, created solely for artistic and entertainment purposes.The goal behind this trailer is to showcase my creativity and storytelling skills through a concept trailer based on a unique and original idea. By combining various effects, sound design, and AI technologies, I’ve crafted a cinematic experience that reimagines familiar worlds in bold and imaginative ways. This trailer is not official and is intended to entertain, inspire, and engage with the YouTube community. Thank you for your support — now let’s dive into a world shaped by creativity and craft. 🎬✨

— In this concept trailer for Spider-Man Brand New Day, Peter Parker navigates a world that has moved on without him, choosing to remain unseen as MJ and Ned continue their lives unaware of the sacrifice he made. As Peter struggles with isolation and the consequences of being erased from everyone’s memory, a mysterious new figure emerges who knows his true identity, threatening to unravel the fragile balance he has tried to maintain. At the same time, the city edges toward chaos as Scorpion’s guarded transfer hints at larger forces in motion and the Inner Demons prepare to strike New York with military precision. Seeking guidance, Peter turns to Bruce Banner, only to confront the painful reality that even the heroes he once stood beside no longer know who he is. With the city under siege and his resolve pushed to its limits, Spider-Man is forced to redefine what it means to be a hero in a world that no longer remembers Peter Parker, culminating in an unexpected intervention from the Punisher that signals a darker, more dangerous chapter ahead.

—  For inquiries: teaseruniverse@gmail.com 📩

snippet.title: Favela Amarela (Trailer Oficial)
snippet.description:
Nas sombras opressivas do Morro do Rato Baleado, Damião, um jovem estudante de direito, mergulha no submundo do tráfico para custear a faculdade online e o barraco onde dorme. De dia, trabalha no mercadinho ao lado de casa. À noite, vigia a favela. 

Durante uma ronda, avista figuras enigmáticas até a densa floresta que sobe ao lado do morro.

Lyrics:
Lukas Graham
"7 Years"

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old

It was a big big world, but we thought we were bigger
Pushing each other to the limits, we were learning quicker
By eleven smoking herb and drinking burning liquor
Never rich so we were out to make that steady figure

Once I was eleven years old, my daddy told me
"Go get yourself a wife or you'll be lonely"
Once I was eleven years old

I always had that dream, like my daddy before me
So I started writing songs, I started writing stories
Something about that glory just always seemed to bore me
'Cause only those I really love will ever really know me

Once I was twenty years old, my story got told
Before the morning sun, when life was lonely
Once I was twenty years old

(Lukas Graham!)

I only see my goals, I don't believe in failure
'Cause I know the smallest voices, they can make it major
I got my boys with me, at least those in favor
And if we don't meet before I leave, I hope I'll see you later

Once I was twenty years old, my story got told
I was writing 'bout everything I saw before me
Once I was twenty years old

Soon we'll be thirty years old, our songs have been sold
We've traveled around the world and we're still roaming
Soon we'll be thirty years old

I'm still learning about life
My woman brought children for me
So I can sing them all my songs
And I can tell them stories
Most of my boys are with me
Some are still out seeking glory
And some I had to leave behind
My brother, I'm still sorry

Soon I'll be sixty years old, my daddy got sixty-one
Remember life, and then your life becomes a better one
I made a man so happy when I wrote a letter once
I hope my children come and visit once or twice a month

Soon I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon I'll be sixty years old

snippet.title: Top 50 Melhores Músicas Gospel 2026, Hinos Evangelicos Mais Tocados, Louvores Que Acalmam O Coração
snippet.description:
Top 50 Melhores Músicas Gospel 2026, Hinos Evangelicos Mais Tocados, Louvores Que Acalmam O Coração

Seja bem-vindo a esta seleção especial com as Top 50 melhores músicas gospel de 2026. Neste vídeo reunimos novos hinos evangélicos e louvores de adoração preparados para trazer paz ao coração e fortalecer sua fé em todos os momentos.

Esta coletânea foi criada para acompanhar seus momentos de oração, reflexão, devocional diário e descanso espiritual. Cada louvor transmite mensagens de esperança, fé e confiança em Deus, ajudando você a encontrar tranquilidade mesmo em meio às dificuldades.

🎵 Sobre esta produção
As músicas apresentadas neste vídeo contam com arranjos e instrumentais produzidos por nossa equipe, preparados com cuidado para oferecer uma experiência de adoração agradável e edificante.

🎬 Experiência visual
As imagens deste vídeo foram criadas e editadas para transmitir uma atmosfera de paz e serenidade, proporcionando um ambiente ideal para ouvir louvores e refletir na presença de Deus.

🙏 Perfeito para momentos de:
• Oração e devocional diário
• Relaxar ouvindo música gospel
• Culto em casa ou meditação espiritual
• Buscar paz e conforto para o coração

Esperamos que estes louvores que acalmam o coração tragam bênçãos para sua vida e sua família. Que a presença de Deus encha seu lar de paz e esperança.

✨ Se este vídeo tocou seu coração, deixe seu “Amém” nos comentários, compartilhe com alguém especial e inscreva-se no canal para receber mais seleções de músicas gospel.
